sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Chubb, USF&G dodge continuous trigger liability in Kiwanis abuse ruling
feed.summary: A federal judge ruled largely in favor of Chubb and USF&G, limiting their liability in a case involving historical abuse allegations at a Kiwanis-affiliated facility. The judge granted narrow coverage under specific Chubb policies for one individual, Guy Cornwell, but denied broader coverage requests, including the application of Washington's continuous trigger rule, due to precise policy language and insufficient evidence from the plaintiffs. This decision provides important guidance for carriers facing similar historical abuse claims, emphasizing the importance of specific policy wording in narrowing exposure.

feed.title: Bank of America Chair and CEO Brian Moynihan to Participate in the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on February 10
feed.summary: Bank of America's Chair and CEO, Brian Moynihan, is slated to speak at the BofA Securities Financial Services Conference on February 10 at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. A live webcast of his participation will be available on the Bank of America Investor Relations website, with a replay also provided. Bank of America, a leading global financial institution, offers extensive banking, investing, asset management, and risk management services to various clients worldwide.

feed.title: The 5 Most Interesting Analyst Questions From Teledyne's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Teledyne's Q4 results exceeded analyst expectations due to strong performance in defense, imaging, and marine instrumentation. Management highlighted operational cost controls and acquisitions as key margin drivers. The article details five significant analyst questions from the earnings call, covering topics like organic vs. inorganic growth, earnings cadence, satellite contract specifics, test and measurement outlook, and memory price increase risks.

feed.title: Former Starbucks VP Janice Waszak Alleges She Was Fired for Raising Safety Concerns Over “Siren” Drink-Making System Including Maggot Contamination and Faulty Equipment
feed.summary: Former Starbucks VP Janice Waszak has filed a lawsuit claiming she was fired for flagging safety concerns about the company's new "Siren" automated drink system, including reports of maggots and equipment failures. Waszak alleges Starbucks terminated her in December 2023 after she reported negative test results and also faced sexual discrimination. Starbucks denies the claims, stating safety is a top priority and the allegations are without merit.

feed.title: Wilson Sonsini Advises Underwriters in Nextracker’s Upsized Initial Public Offering
feed.summary: Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati advised the underwriters in Nextracker Inc.'s upsized initial public offering. Nextracker, a subsidiary of Flex Ltd., priced its IPO at $24 per share for 26.6 million shares, with trading beginning on Nasdaq under "NXT" on February 9, 2023. The underwriters also exercised their option to purchase an additional 3.99 million shares.

feed.title: Honeywell Earnings: What To Look For From HON
feed.summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ:HON) is set to release its Q4 earnings this Thursday before market hours. Analysts anticipate an 8.1% year-on-year revenue increase to $9.91 billion and adjusted earnings of $2.54 per share. The stock has seen positive investor sentiment, rising 12.1% over the last month, and analysts have an average price target of $236.44.

feed.title: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From RLI's Q4 Earnings Call
feed.summary: RLI's Q4 2025 results saw tepid top-line growth and competitive headwinds, despite improved underwriting and higher investment income leading to margin expansion. Analysts focused on the stability of the casualty loss ratio, competitive pressures in property insurance, and the impact of technology investments on the surety business. Management addressed these concerns, emphasizing profitability over volume amid a challenging market.

feed.title: AIT Q4 Deep Dive: Mixed Organic Growth Amid Pricing Actions and Automation Momentum
feed.summary: Applied Industrial Technologies (AIT) reported Q4 CY2025 results with revenue slightly missing expectations but GAAP profit beating estimates. The company experienced mixed organic growth due to seasonal weaknesses and LIFO expense impacts, yet saw strong momentum in its engineered solutions segment, particularly automation. Management anticipates future growth from industrial and technology tailwinds, continued pricing actions, and strategic acquisitions while navigating near-term profitability pressures.

feed.title: Ten-Year Tally: Procter & Gamble Stock Delivers $71 Bil Gain
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (PG) stock has returned $71 billion to shareholders over the last decade through dividends and buybacks, ranking it 34th historically among companies for capital returned. While attractive, high capital returns can sometimes imply lower growth prospects compared to companies like Meta or Microsoft. Despite solid fundamentals, PG stock has experienced significant pullbacks during market downturns, emphasizing that even blue-chip stocks are not immune to risk.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin Q4 Preview: Can Record $179 Billion Backlog Overcome Execution Jitters? LMT Guidance Hints At Beat Vs. Street Consensus
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin is set to report its fourth-quarter earnings with a significant $179 billion backlog, despite recent operational challenges. The company's full-year guidance suggests it may surpass Wall Street's EPS consensus of $5.87, potentially reaching $6.56 per share for the quarter. Investor focus will be on the F-35 program's execution and the company's 2026 cash flow outlook, which will influence whether bullish or bearish long-term perspectives prevail.

feed.title: Eaton plans to spin off its mobility group into a standalone company
feed.summary: Eaton Corporation plc announced its plan to spin off its Mobility Group, which includes its Vehicle and eMobility segments, into a new, independent publicly traded company. This strategic move aims to allow Eaton to focus on its high-growth Electrical and Aerospace businesses, while the standalone Mobility Group can pursue its own growth and innovation objectives tailored to the mobility sector. The separation is expected to be completed by the end of the first quarter of 2027 and is intended to unlock long-term value for shareholders.

feed.title: Bank of America Corporation $BAC Stake Increased by AGP Franklin LLC
feed.summary: AGP Franklin LLC significantly increased its stake in Bank of America (BAC) by 46.7% in Q3, now owning over 60,000 shares worth $3.11 million. This increase, alongside similar moves by other institutional investors, indicates strong institutional buying interest, with over 70% of the stock held by such entities. Analysts largely maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $60.00, reflecting confidence despite some recent price target adjustments.

feed.title: AGP Franklin LLC Takes $1.85 Million Position in PACCAR Inc. $PCAR
feed.summary: AGP Franklin LLC has initiated a new position in PACCAR Inc. (NASDAQ:PCAR), purchasing 18,829 shares valued at approximately $1.85 million in the third quarter. The move comes as PACCAR reported Q4 EPS that matched estimates but saw a significant revenue decline of 15.1% year-over-year, signaling demand weakness despite healthy profitability. Wall Street analysts maintain a mixed sentiment, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $113.42.

feed.title: Direxion Daily TSM Bull 2X Shares (NASDAQ:TSMX) Sees Significant Increase in Short Interest
feed.summary: Direxion Daily TSM Bull 2X Shares (TSMX) experienced a significant 310.4% increase in short interest during January, reaching 51,124 shares as of January 15th. The article also notes recent institutional investor activity, with several firms increasing their stakes, and reports that TSMX shares rose by 3.2%, opening at $60.10. Additionally, the company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2624 per share.

feed.title: Allegiance Financial Group Advisory Services LLC Increases Stock Position in Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: Allegiance Financial Group Advisory Services LLC significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. by 489.9% in Q3, now owning 10,771 shares valued at $2.623 million. This makes Alphabet its 23rd largest holding, representing 0.6% of its portfolio. Despite positive sentiment from analysts regarding AI and cloud momentum, Alphabet faces regulatory challenges and competitive pressure from rivals like OpenAI and Microsoft.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) Expected to Announce Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) is scheduled to announce its Q4 2025 earnings before market open on Wednesday, February 4th, with analysts anticipating $2.47 EPS and $1.9244 billion in revenue. The company had previously beaten estimates in Q3 2025 with $2.81 EPS and $1.89 billion revenue. Currently, analyst sentiment points to a "Reduce" rating with an average target price of $107.31, following several target price reductions by firms like Goldman Sachs and Barclays.

feed.title: IDEX (IEX) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: IDEX (IEX) is scheduled to release its Q4 2025 earnings before market open on Wednesday, February 4th, with analysts projecting $2.04 EPS and $882 million in revenue. The company previously surpassed earnings estimates, reporting $2.03 EPS against an expected $1.93, with a 10.1% year-over-year revenue increase. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $203.29, and IDEX recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.71 per share.

feed.title: Essex Property Trust (ESS) Projected to Post Quarterly Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Essex Property Trust (ESS) is expected to announce its Q4 2025 earnings after the market closes on Wednesday, February 4th. Analysts project earnings of $4.00 per share and revenue of $474.66 million. The company recently paid a quarterly dividend of $2.57, representing an annualized yield of approximately 4.1%.

feed.title: Follow the money: State Street expands in Abu Dhabi as UAE attracts global capital
feed.summary: State Street is expanding its operations in Abu Dhabi, reflecting the increasing global capital flow into the UAE. This move positions the financial giant to better serve clients in the Middle East and North Africa region. The expansion underscores Abu Dhabi's growing importance as a financial hub and its success in attracting international investment.

feed.title: B.Riley initiates coverage on Aardvark Therapeutics stock with Buy rating
feed.summary: B.Riley has initiated coverage on Aardvark Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:AARD) with a Buy rating and a $32.00 price target, significantly higher than its current $14.70 price. The firm cites Aardvark's strong financial position and its lead drug candidates, ARD-101 for Prader-Willi syndrome and ARD-201 for weight management, which are both in advanced clinical trials. This positive outlook is consistent with other analyst ratings, which also highlight the company's differentiated obesity treatment portfolio.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal stock rating upgraded by TD Cowen on ROE outlook
feed.summary: TD Cowen has upgraded Bank of Montreal (BMO) from Hold to Buy and raised its price target to C$209.00, viewing the bank's new target to achieve a 15% return on equity (ROE) by 2027 "very favourably." The firm expects BMO's ROE to increase by 300 basis points over the next two years, driven by U.S. net interest margin improvement, U.S. loan growth, provisions for credit losses, and share buybacks. BMO's shares have delivered a 43.51% return over the past year.

feed.title: Phillips 66 (PSX) Projected to Post Earnings on Wednesday
feed.summary: Phillips 66 (PSX) is expected to release its Q4 2025 earnings before market open on Wednesday, February 4th, with analysts projecting $2.24 EPS and $33.81 billion in revenue. The company surpassed estimates in its previous report, posting $2.52 EPS on $33.69 billion revenue. Insider activity shows sales of approximately 86,094 shares totaling $12 million over the last three months, while analysts currently hold a consensus "Hold" rating with an average target price of $153.53.

feed.title: FT Vest Rising Dividend Achievers Target Income ETF $RDVI is Adamsbrown Wealth Consultants LLC’s 7th Largest Position
feed.summary: Adamsbrown Wealth Consultants LLC significantly increased its stake in FT Vest Rising Dividend Achievers Target Income ETF (RDVI) by 10.0% in the third quarter, making it their 7th largest position. Other institutional investors like Allworth Financial LP and IMG Wealth Management Inc. also adjusted their holdings. The ETF recently announced an increased monthly dividend and aims to provide current income and capital appreciation through dividend-paying US equities and a naked call writing strategy on the S&P 500 Index.

feed.title: Chevron Appoints New Independent Director
feed.summary: Chevron has appointed Thomas W. Horton, former Chairman and CEO of American Airlines, as an independent director and member of its audit committee. Horton's extensive experience from various high-profile roles, including at Global Infrastructure Partners, Warburg Pincus, Walmart, and General Electric, is expected to enhance Chevron's corporate governance and strategic decision-making in a complex oil and gas market. This appointment comes as Chevron seeks to strengthen its position and gain new perspectives, especially regarding its oilfield deal in Iraq.

feed.title: Polen Capital Bets on Robotic Surgery Leader Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) for Future Growth
feed.summary: Polen Capital Management initiated a 2.25% position in Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) in Q4 2025, viewing the robotic surgery leader as an "accelerating monopoly" due to its dominant da Vinci system and significant barriers to entry for competitors. Despite the Polen Focus Growth Strategy underperforming in Q4 2025, the firm believes ISRG has substantial long-term growth potential through the conversion of open and laparoscopic surgeries to robotic procedures and the recent launch of its next-generation platform. The article notes that while ISRG is not among the top 30 most popular stocks among hedge funds, Polen Capital sees its reasonable valuation and continued innovation as key drivers for future performance.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Drives Q4 Gains as Pharma Fundamentals Shine Amid Sector Rotation
feed.summary: Polen Capital Management's Q4 2025 investor letter highlighted Eli Lilly and Company (LLY) as a top relative contributor to their Polen Focus Growth Strategy despite the overall fund underperforming due to market volatility. Eli Lilly's stock rallied over 40% in Q4 2025, driven by strong financial results, market leadership, and a new agreement with the White House regarding GLP-1 drug pricing, which is expected to expand its addressable market. The company remains a significant holding among hedge funds, although Polen Capital Management also noted a focus on AI stocks for potentially higher, shorter-term returns.

feed.title: Solar Airport Market Rewriting its Growth Cycle | First Solar, Canadian Solar, JinkoSolar
feed.summary: The Solar Airport Market is experiencing a growth cycle driven by sustainability mandates and rising energy costs, with key trends including integration with energy storage and advanced solar technologies. Opportunities exist in hybrid solar-storage systems and Public-Private Partnerships. The report by HTF Market Intelligence analyzes market breakdown by application, type, end-user, and geography, highlighting crucial market developments and offering insights for stakeholders.

feed.title: Five reasons to go rugged in public safety: Sonim Technologies on building phones for fireground realties
feed.summary: Michael Coad of Sonim Technologies explains why rugged mobile devices are essential for public safety workers, particularly first responders and firefighters. The article highlights five key reasons for choosing rugged phones: lower total cost of ownership, durability in extreme environments, enhanced mobile features like push-to-talk, integrated security, and support for dedicated public safety networks. These features ensure reliable communication and operational efficiency in challenging and often hazardous conditions.

feed.title: Blackstone Plans 216 MW Data Centre Hub in Chennai
feed.summary: Global investment firm Blackstone Group is expanding its presence in India's data center sector with plans to invest over INR 10,000 crore to develop a 216 MW hyperscale data center campus in Chennai. The project, under Blackstone's Lumina CloudInfra platform, includes acquiring a 16-acre land parcel and will be developed in collaboration with Beary Group. This initiative further solidifies Blackstone's position as a major data center owner in India, bringing its total potential capacity to over 700 MW across various cities.

feed.title: Applied Materials Unveils New 8.06 Lakh Square-Foot Workplace in Bengaluru, Setting a New Benchmark for Sustainable, Inclusive Design
feed.summary: Applied Materials India Private Limited has inaugurated a new 8.06 lakh square-foot workplace in Bengaluru, reinforcing its commitment to India's semiconductor industry. The facility emphasizes sustainable and inclusive design, targeting USGBC LEED Gold certification, and integrates Indian art and culture with technology. This investment aims to strengthen India’s semiconductor ecosystem through enhanced R&D, product engineering, and co-innovation.

feed.title: A Look At Turning Point Brands (TPB) Valuation After Strong Q3 Beat And Updated Capital Plans
feed.summary: Turning Point Brands (TPB) exceeded Q3 revenue and EBITDA expectations, driven by its Modern Oral segment. The stock has seen significant returns and is currently trading slightly above its fair value estimate of $121.25. While the Modern Oral segment's growth is a key driver, the company's valuation hinges on sustained growth and regulatory factors.

feed.title: Western Union, HCLTech inaugurate GCC in Hyderabad
feed.summary: Western Union has launched its Global Capability Center (GCC) in Hyderabad, India, in collaboration with HCLTech. This new facility aims to accelerate Western Union's transformation through advanced AI-led innovation and a platform operating model. The center will leverage deep engineering expertise and AI capabilities to enhance global payment and consumer experiences.

feed.title: Is Performance Food Group (PFGC) Pricing Reflecting Its Strong Multi Year Share Price Gains
feed.summary: Performance Food Group (PFGC) has shown strong share price gains over the last five years but its recent 1-year return is lagging peers. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 48.4%, with an intrinsic value of $188.94 per share compared to its current price of $97.43. However, its P/E ratio of 46.89x is significantly higher than both the industry average and Simply Wall St's proprietary Fair Ratio, indicating it appears overvalued on this metric.

feed.title: Blue Owl Deadline: OWL Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Blue Owl Capital Inc. Securities Fraud L...
feed.summary: Rosen Law Firm reminds investors who purchased securities of Blue Owl Capital Inc. (NYSE: OWL) between February 6, 2025, and November 16, 2025, of the upcoming lead plaintiff deadline on February 2, 2026, in a securities fraud lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Blue Owl made false and/or misleading statements and failed to disclose liquidity issues related to BDC redemptions, harming investors. Investors are encouraged to contact the firm to potentially join the class action.

feed.title: How CMS Energy’s Dual Push on Customer Aid and Clean Power (CMS) Has Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: CMS Energy, through its subsidiary Consumers Energy, has committed over US$100 million in customer assistance while simultaneously reaffirming a US$20 billion capital spending plan focused on clean energy and grid investments. This dual strategy emphasizes customer affordability and strong regulatory relationships as central to its investment narrative. Investors should monitor upcoming results, dividend performance, and execution on renewable projects, while also considering the risks associated with high capital requirements and interest costs.

feed.title: Applied Materials to support growing semiconductor talent with new Bengaluru facility
feed.summary: Applied Materials India has opened a new 8.06 lakh square-foot workplace in Bengaluru to support its growing workforce and the country's semiconductor ecosystem. The facility is designed for collaboration, employee well-being, and sustainability, aiming for LEED Gold certification. This investment aims to foster innovation, talent development, and long-term careers in India's rapidly advancing semiconductor industry.

feed.title: New Gold (TSX:NGD) Is Up 10.7% After Strong 2025 Output And Sales Beat - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: New Gold Inc. reported strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results, exceeding production and sales targets for gold and copper, which led to a 10.7% stock increase. This performance reinforces the existing bullish sentiment around its earnings growth and project delivery, especially considering its pending acquisition by Coeur Mining. The article suggests that while operational success solidifies the bull case, the primary risk now shifts to the successful completion of the Coeur transaction.

feed.title: SETTLEMENT AGREEMENTS—HOUSEHOLD PRODUCTS: CPSC provisionally accepts $14.15 million settlement with Clorox over delayed reporting of bacterial contamination in Pine-Sol products
feed.summary: The CPSC has provisionally accepted a $14.15 million settlement with Clorox. This settlement addresses Clorox's alleged failure to timely report bacterial contamination issues in its Pine-Sol products. The agreement awaits final approval.

feed.title: Raymond James Brings In $201 Million Plymouth, Michigan Team From UBS
feed.summary: Raymond James & Associates has recruited financial advisor Ronald Shmyr and his team, Tortuga Financial Group, from UBS Financial Services. The Plymouth, Michigan-based practice oversees $201 million in client assets and includes Ronald Shmyr's family members. The move was influenced by Raymond James' leadership and support for the family-owned practice's independence, with the firm citing total client assets of approximately $1.77 trillion as of November 30, 2025.

feed.title: ProShares S&P 500 Ex-Technology ETF (NYSEARCA:SPXT) Short Interest Up 431.8% in January
feed.summary: Short interest in ProShares S&P 500 Ex-Technology ETF (SPXT) surged by 431.8% in January, reaching 46,916 shares. This increase signifies growing bearish sentiment, with approximately 1.8% of the company's shares sold short. The article also notes recent investments in SPXT by various institutional investors and provides an overview of the ETF's stock performance and underlying index.

feed.title: Energy Fuels stock rating upgraded to Neutral by Roth/MKM on uranium outlook
feed.summary: Roth/MKM has upgraded Energy Fuels (NYSE:UUUU) from Sell to Neutral and raised its price target to $15.50 from $13.00, citing "near-term catalysts and sentiment" that are "likely to lean positive." Despite the stock's significant surge over the past year, Roth/MKM believes strong market sentiment and a rising uranium spot price will offset any potential near-term correction, even though InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be overvalued compared to the new price target. The company recently announced plans to acquire Australian Strategic Materials Limited and exceeded its uranium production guidance for 2025.

feed.title: Coca-Cola captures football’s emotional highs and lows in FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign
feed.summary: Coca-Cola has launched its global FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign, focusing on the emotional highs and lows of football. The campaign, which includes films, digital activations, and a new anthem reimagining Van Halen's "Jump," aims to connect with fans through shared experiences. Coca-Cola is also partnering with football figures and Panini for a sticker collection, emphasizing its role as a constant companion throughout the tournament.

feed.title: Sysco stock price target raised to $83 by Piper Sandler on positive case growth
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has increased its price target for Sysco (NYSE:SYY) to $83.00 from $80.00, maintaining a Neutral rating, after the company reported strong fiscal second-quarter 2026 results. The stock is currently trading near its 52-week high, following an 11.0% increase after the earnings release. Sysco demonstrated positive U.S. Foodservice case growth and anticipates continued growth, contributing to its "GOOD" financial health score and 56 consecutive years of dividend payments.

feed.title: Main takeaways from Kimberly-Clark’s (KMB) Q4 2025 earnings report
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark Corporation reported mixed results for Q4 2025 with earnings beating estimates but revenue falling short. Net sales declined 0.6% year-over-year to $4.08 billion, while adjusted EPS rose 24% to $1.86. The company anticipates organic sales growth in line with or ahead of category growth for fiscal year 2026, with adjusted EPS expected to be flat on a constant currency basis.

feed.title: Runway Growth Finance prices 7.25% senior notes offering
feed.summary: Runway Growth Finance (RWAY) has priced an offering of 7.25% senior notes due 2028. The notes will mature in 2028 and will be listed on the New York Stock Exchange. The offering is expected to close on December 21, 2023, subject to customary closing conditions.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin's newest GPS satellite reaches orbit, strengthening warfighter connectivity
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin successfully launched its ninth GPS III space vehicle, SV09, into orbit, enhancing the GPS constellation's resilience and capabilities. The satellite provides 3x better accuracy and 8x improved anti-jamming for military and civilian users, and includes a laser retroreflector array for improved Earth-orientation measurements. Lockheed Martin has completed initial GPS III production and is now developing next-generation GPS IIIF satellites for future advancements.

feed.title: Tharimmune Announces Expanded Role as Super Validator on Canton Network
feed.summary: Tharimmune, Inc. (NASDAQ: THAR) has been approved to operate as a Super Validator on the Canton Network, enhancing its role in securing transactions and accruing rewards in Canton Coin (CC). This expanded role allows Tharimmune to provide in-depth quarterly research, host webinars, and further support the digitization of traditional financial markets. The company will also continue to invest in applications built on the Canton Network, accelerating institutional utility and adoption.

feed.title: PLDT, Smart Bridge Philippines’ Digital Divide Nationwide
feed.summary: PLDT Inc. and Smart Communications are working to bridge the digital divide in the Philippines by investing in network infrastructure, innovative technologies like Radisys broadband wireless access and Google's Taara laser communication, and partnering with government stakeholders. They are also expanding connectivity to state universities and colleges and supporting the "Bayanihan SIM" initiative to provide mobile data to underserved areas, aligning with UN Sustainable Development Goals.

feed.title: Performant Healthcare, Inc. Announces Preliminary Financial Results for Second Quarter 2025
feed.summary: Performant Healthcare, Inc. announced preliminary financial results for the second quarter of 2025, expecting revenues of $37.8 million, net income of $2.1 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $6.2 million. Concurrently, the company revealed its definitive agreement to be acquired by Machinify, a healthcare intelligence leader, leading to the cancellation of its second-quarter earnings call and withdrawal of full-year 2025 guidance. The company, a provider of technology-enabled payment integrity services, will no longer hold its scheduled conference call.

feed.title: US' Kimberly-Clark's sales down 0.6% to $4.1 bn in Q4
feed.summary: Kimberly-Clark reported a 0.6% decrease in net sales to $4.1 billion in Q4 2025, primarily due to exiting its US private-label diaper business, despite 2.1% organic sales growth. While productivity gains boosted adjusted operating profit, overall fiscal 2025 profits declined due to transformation charges. Chairman and CEO Mike Hsu highlighted the company's accelerated transformation, focusing on innovation, brand strengthening, and cost discipline, alongside the strategic acquisition of Kenvue.
